name: Timeline Planning
description: Creates realistic, detailed project timelines and production schedules — balancing dependencies, milestones, team capacity, and client expectations to deliver campaigns on time without surprises.

variables.name: project_name
variables.description: Name of the project or campaign

variables.name: scope
variables.description: Full scope of work including all deliverables

variables.name: deadlines
variables.description: Fixed deadlines and client key dates

variables.name: team_availability
variables.description: Team member availability and capacity constraints

variables.name: approval_workflow
variables.description: Client approval process and expected turnaround times

variables.name: risk_factors
variables.description: Known risks that could impact the timeline

inputs.name: project_name
